summary_en: The Bible is God's inspired Word — the trustworthy revelation of His will and the final standard of faith and practice.
summary_sw: Biblia ni Neno la Mungu lililovuviwa — ufunuo wa kuaminika wa mapenzi yake na kipimo cha mwisho cha imani na matendo.
body_en: Seventh-day Adventists believe that the Old and New Testament Scriptures were given by divine inspiration through holy men of God who spoke and wrote as they were moved by the Holy Spirit. In His Word, God has committed to humanity the knowledge necessary for salvation. The Scriptures reveal God's character, teach true doctrine, and record His acts in history. They are the standard by which all teaching and experience must be tested.
body_sw: Waadventista wa Sabato wanaamini kwamba Maandiko ya Agano la Kale na Jipya yalitolewa kwa uvuvio wa Mungu kupitia watu watakatifu waliosema na kuandika walipoongozwa na Roho Mtakatifu. Katika Neno lake, Mungu amewapa wanadamu maarifa yanayohitajika kwa wokovu. Maandiko yanadhihirisha tabia ya Mungu, yanafundisha mafundisho ya kweli, na yanaeleza matendo yake katika historia. Ni kipimo ambacho mafundisho yote na uzoefu wote lazima vipimwe kwacho.

summary_en: There is one God: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — a unity of three co-eternal Persons.
summary_sw: Kuna Mungu mmoja: Baba, Mwana, na Roho Mtakatifu — umoja wa Nafsi tatu za milele.
body_en: God is one, yet exists as a unity of three co-eternal Persons: the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit. God is immortal, all-powerful, all-knowing, above all, and ever present. He is infinite and beyond human understanding, yet known through His self-revelation. God is love, and He is forever worthy of worship, adoration, and service by the whole creation.
body_sw: Mungu ni mmoja, lakini yupo kama umoja wa Nafsi tatu za milele: Baba, Mwana, na Roho Mtakatifu. Mungu hafi, ni mwenye uwezo wote, anajua yote, yu juu ya vyote, na yupo kila mahali. Hana mipaka na yu zaidi ya ufahamu wa mwanadamu, lakini anajulikana kupitia kujifunua kwake mwenyewe. Mungu ni upendo, na anastahili milele ibada, heshima, na utumishi wa viumbe vyote.

summary_en: The eternal Father is the Creator, Source, Sustainer, and Sovereign of all creation — just, holy, merciful, and abounding in steadfast love.
summary_sw: Baba wa milele ni Muumbaji, Chanzo, Mtegemezaji, na Mtawala wa viumbe vyote — mwenye haki, mtakatifu, mwenye rehema, na mwingi wa upendo usiokoma.
body_en: God the eternal Father is the Creator, Source, Sustainer, and Sovereign of all creation. He is just and holy, merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abounding in steadfast love and faithfulness. The qualities and powers seen in the Son and the Holy Spirit are also revelations of the Father. The Father's love was supremely shown in giving His Son for the salvation of the world.
body_sw: Mungu Baba wa milele ni Muumbaji, Chanzo, Mtegemezaji, na Mtawala wa viumbe vyote. Ni mwenye haki na mtakatifu, mwenye rehema na neema, si mwepesi wa hasira, na ni mwingi wa upendo na uaminifu usiokoma. Sifa na nguvu zinazoonekana katika Mwana na Roho Mtakatifu pia ni ufunuo wa Baba. Upendo wa Baba ulionyeshwa kwa ukamilifu alipomtoa Mwanawe kwa ajili ya wokovu wa ulimwengu.

summary_en: Jesus Christ, truly God and truly man, lived a sinless life, died for our sins, rose from the dead, and ministers for us in heaven.
summary_sw: Yesu Kristo, Mungu kweli na mwanadamu kweli, aliishi maisha yasiyo na dhambi, alikufa kwa ajili ya dhambi zetu, alifufuka, na anatuhudumia mbinguni.
body_en: God the eternal Son became incarnate in Jesus Christ. Through Him all things were created, the character of God is revealed, the salvation of humanity is accomplished, and the world is judged. Forever truly God, He became also truly human. He lived and experienced temptation as a human being, yet perfectly exemplified the righteousness and love of God. He suffered and died voluntarily on the cross for our sins, was raised from the dead, and ascended to minister in the heavenly sanctuary on our behalf. He will come again in glory to deliver His people and restore all things.
body_sw: Mungu Mwana wa milele alifanyika mwili katika Yesu Kristo. Kupitia yeye vitu vyote viliumbwa, tabia ya Mungu inadhihirishwa, wokovu wa wanadamu unakamilishwa, na ulimwengu unahukumiwa. Akiwa Mungu kweli milele, alikuwa pia mwanadamu kweli. Aliishi na kujaribiwa kama mwanadamu, lakini alionyesha kwa ukamilifu haki na upendo wa Mungu. Aliteseka na kufa kwa hiari msalabani kwa ajili ya dhambi zetu, alifufuliwa kutoka kwa wafu, na alipaa ili kuhudumu katika patakatifu pa mbinguni kwa niaba yetu. Atakuja tena katika utukufu kuwakomboa watu wake na kufanya vitu vyote kuwa vipya.

summary_en: The Holy Spirit inspired Scripture, empowered Christ's life, draws and convicts people, renews believers, and gives spiritual gifts to the church.
summary_sw: Roho Mtakatifu aliwavuvia waandishi wa Maandiko, alimtia nguvu Kristo, huwavuta na kuwaonya watu, huwafanya waamini kuwa wapya, na huwapa kanisa karama za kiroho.
body_en: God the eternal Spirit was active with the Father and the Son in creation, incarnation, and redemption. He inspired the writers of Scripture and filled Christ's life with power. He draws and convicts human beings, and those who respond He renews and transforms into the image of God. Sent by the Father and the Son to be always with His children, He extends spiritual gifts to the church, empowers it to bear witness to Christ, and in harmony with the Scriptures leads it into all truth.
body_sw: Mungu Roho wa milele alishiriki pamoja na Baba na Mwana katika uumbaji, kufanyika mwili, na ukombozi. Aliwavuvia waandishi wa Maandiko na kuijaza nguvu maisha ya Kristo. Huwavuta na kuwaonya wanadamu, na wale wanaoitikia huwafanya upya na kuwabadilisha kuwa mfano wa Mungu. Akiwa ametumwa na Baba na Mwana kuwa pamoja na watoto wake daima, huligawia kanisa karama za kiroho, hulipa nguvu ya kumshuhudia Kristo, na kwa kupatana na Maandiko huliongoza katika kweli yote.

summary_en: God created the heavens and the earth in six days and rested on the seventh, establishing the Sabbath as a memorial of creation.
summary_sw: Mungu aliumba mbingu na nchi kwa siku sita na kupumzika siku ya saba, akiiweka Sabato kuwa kumbukumbu ya uumbaji.
body_en: God has revealed in Scripture the authentic and historical account of His creative activity. In six days the Lord made the heavens and the earth and all living things, and rested on the seventh day. Thus He established the Sabbath as a perpetual memorial of the work He performed and completed. The first man and woman were made in the image of God as the crowning work of creation, given dominion over the world, and charged with responsibility to care for it. When the world was finished it was very good, declaring the glory of God.
body_sw: Mungu amefunua katika Maandiko habari halisi na ya kihistoria ya kazi yake ya uumbaji. Kwa siku sita Bwana aliumba mbingu na nchi na viumbe vyote vilivyo hai, na akapumzika siku ya saba. Hivyo aliiweka Sabato kuwa kumbukumbu ya kudumu ya kazi aliyoifanya na kuikamilisha. Mwanamume na mwanamke wa kwanza waliumbwa kwa mfano wa Mungu kama taji ya uumbaji, wakapewa mamlaka juu ya ulimwengu, na jukumu la kuutunza. Ulimwengu ulipokamilika ulikuwa mzuri sana, ukitangaza utukufu wa Mungu.

summary_en: Man and woman were made in God's image but fell through sin; in Christ, God reconciles and restores fallen humanity.
summary_sw: Mwanamume na mwanamke waliumbwa kwa mfano wa Mungu lakini walianguka kwa dhambi; katika Kristo, Mungu huwapatanisha na kuwarejesha wanadamu walioanguka.
body_en: Man and woman were made in the image of God with individuality and the freedom to think and act. Each person is an indivisible unity of body, mind, and spirit, dependent upon God for life, breath, and all else. When our first parents disobeyed God, they denied their dependence on Him and fell from their high position. The image of God in them was marred and they became subject to death, and their descendants share this fallen nature. But God in Christ reconciled the world to Himself and, by His Spirit, restores in penitent people the image of their Maker.
body_sw: Mwanamume na mwanamke waliumbwa kwa mfano wa Mungu wakiwa na utu na uhuru wa kufikiri na kutenda. Kila mtu ni umoja usiogawanyika wa mwili, akili, na roho, akimtegemea Mungu kwa uhai, pumzi, na vitu vyote. Wazazi wetu wa kwanza walipomwasi Mungu, walikana kumtegemea kwao na wakaanguka kutoka nafasi yao kuu. Mfano wa Mungu ndani yao uliharibika na wakawa chini ya mauti, na wazao wao wanashiriki asili hii iliyoanguka. Lakini Mungu katika Kristo aliupatanisha ulimwengu na nafsi yake, na kwa Roho wake, hurejesha ndani ya watu wenye toba mfano wa Muumba wao.

summary_en: All humanity is involved in a great controversy between Christ and Satan over God's character, law, and sovereignty.
summary_sw: Wanadamu wote wamo katika pambano kuu kati ya Kristo na Shetani kuhusu tabia ya Mungu, sheria yake, na utawala wake.
body_en: All humanity is now involved in a great controversy between Christ and Satan regarding the character of God, His law, and His sovereignty over the universe. This conflict began in heaven when a created being, given freedom of choice, exalted himself and became Satan, God's adversary, leading a portion of the angels into rebellion. He introduced the spirit of rebellion into this world when he led Adam and Eve into sin. Observed by the whole creation, this world became the arena of the universal conflict, out of which the God of love will ultimately be vindicated. To assist His people, God sends the Holy Spirit and loyal angels to guide, protect, and sustain them in the way of salvation.
body_sw: Wanadamu wote sasa wamo katika pambano kuu kati ya Kristo na Shetani kuhusu tabia ya Mungu, sheria yake, na utawala wake juu ya ulimwengu wote. Pambano hili lilianza mbinguni wakati kiumbe aliyepewa uhuru wa kuchagua alipojikweza na kuwa Shetani, adui wa Mungu, akiwaongoza sehemu ya malaika katika uasi. Alileta roho ya uasi katika ulimwengu huu alipowaongoza Adamu na Hawa katika dhambi. Ukitazamwa na viumbe vyote, ulimwengu huu ukawa uwanja wa pambano la ulimwengu wote, ambamo mwishowe Mungu wa upendo atathibitishwa kuwa mwenye haki. Ili kuwasaidia watu wake, Mungu humtuma Roho Mtakatifu na malaika waaminifu kuwaongoza, kuwalinda, na kuwategemeza katika njia ya wokovu.

title_en: The Life, Death, and Resurrection of Christ
title_sw: Maisha, Kifo na Ufufuo wa Kristo
summary_en: In Christ's perfect life, atoning death, and resurrection, God provided the only means of salvation for humanity.
summary_sw: Katika maisha makamilifu ya Kristo, kifo chake cha upatanisho, na ufufuo wake, Mungu alitoa njia pekee ya wokovu kwa wanadamu.
body_en: In Christ's life of perfect obedience to God's will, His suffering, death, and resurrection, God provided the only means of atonement for human sin. Those who by faith accept this atonement may have eternal life, and the whole creation may better understand the infinite and holy love of the Creator. This perfect atonement vindicates the righteousness of God's law and the graciousness of His character; it both condemns our sin and provides for our forgiveness. The resurrection of Christ proclaims God's triumph over the forces of evil, and for those who accept the atonement it assures their final victory over sin and death.
body_sw: Katika maisha ya Kristo ya utii mkamilifu kwa mapenzi ya Mungu, mateso yake, kifo chake, na ufufuo wake, Mungu alitoa njia pekee ya upatanisho kwa dhambi ya mwanadamu. Wale wanaokubali upatanisho huu kwa imani wanaweza kuwa na uzima wa milele, na viumbe vyote vinaweza kuelewa vizuri zaidi upendo usio na mipaka na mtakatifu wa Muumba. Upatanisho huu mkamilifu unathibitisha haki ya sheria ya Mungu na wema wa tabia yake; unahukumu dhambi yetu na pia unatoa msamaha wetu. Ufufuo wa Kristo unatangaza ushindi wa Mungu juu ya nguvu za uovu, na kwa wale wanaokubali upatanisho unawahakikishia ushindi wao wa mwisho juu ya dhambi na mauti.

summary_en: In infinite love and mercy God made Christ to be sin for us, so that in Him we might be made righteous — justified by faith and renewed by the Spirit.
summary_sw: Kwa upendo na rehema zisizo na mipaka Mungu alimfanya Kristo kuwa dhambi kwa ajili yetu, ili ndani yake tupate kuwa wenye haki — tukihesabiwa haki kwa imani na kufanywa upya na Roho.
body_en: In infinite love and mercy God made Christ, who knew no sin, to be sin for us, so that in Him we might be made the righteousness of God. Led by the Holy Spirit we sense our need, acknowledge our sinfulness, repent of our transgressions, and exercise faith in Jesus as Saviour and Lord, Substitute and Example. This saving faith comes through the divine power of the Word and is the gift of God's grace. Through Christ we are justified, adopted as God's sons and daughters, and delivered from the lordship of sin. Through the Spirit we are born again and sanctified, growing into the likeness of His character.
body_sw: Kwa upendo na rehema zisizo na mipaka Mungu alimfanya Kristo, asiyejua dhambi, kuwa dhambi kwa ajili yetu, ili ndani yake tupate kuwa haki ya Mungu. Tukiongozwa na Roho Mtakatifu tunatambua uhitaji wetu, tunakiri hali yetu ya dhambi, tunatubu makosa yetu, na tunamwamini Yesu kama Mwokozi na Bwana, Mbadala na Kielelezo. Imani hii iokoayo huja kupitia nguvu ya Neno la Mungu na ni zawadi ya neema yake. Kupitia Kristo tunahesabiwa haki, tunafanywa wana wa Mungu, na tunakombolewa kutoka utawala wa dhambi. Kupitia Roho tunazaliwa mara ya pili na kutakaswa, tukikua katika mfano wa tabia yake.

summary_en: By His death Jesus triumphed over evil; in Him we walk in freedom, peace, and daily fellowship, growing in His likeness.
summary_sw: Kwa kifo chake Yesu alishinda uovu; ndani yake tunatembea katika uhuru, amani, na ushirika wa kila siku, tukikua katika mfano wake.
body_en: By His death on the cross Jesus triumphed over the forces of evil. He who subjugated demonic spirits during His earthly ministry has broken their power and made certain their ultimate doom. Jesus' victory gives us victory over the evil forces that still seek to control us, as we walk with Him in peace, joy, and assurance of His love. Now the Holy Spirit dwells within us and empowers us. Continually committed to Jesus as our Saviour and Lord, we are set free from the burden of our past deeds. Called to grow into the likeness of His character, we commune with Him daily in prayer, feed on His Word, meditate on it and on His providence, sing His praises, gather together for worship, and participate in the mission of the church.
body_sw: Kwa kifo chake msalabani Yesu alishinda nguvu za uovu. Yeye aliyewatiisha pepo wachafu wakati wa huduma yake duniani amevunja nguvu zao na kuhakikisha maangamizi yao ya mwisho. Ushindi wa Yesu hutupa ushindi juu ya nguvu za uovu ambazo bado zinataka kututawala, tunapotembea naye katika amani, furaha, na uhakika wa upendo wake. Sasa Roho Mtakatifu anakaa ndani yetu na kututia nguvu. Tukijitoa daima kwa Yesu kama Mwokozi na Bwana wetu, tunawekwa huru kutoka mzigo wa matendo yetu ya zamani. Tukiitwa kukua katika mfano wa tabia yake, tunashirikiana naye kila siku katika maombi, tunakula Neno lake, tunalitafakari pamoja na uongozi wake, tunaimba sifa zake, tunakusanyika kwa ibada, na tunashiriki katika utume wa kanisa.

summary_en: The church is the community of believers who confess Jesus Christ as Lord and Saviour — the body of Christ on earth.
summary_sw: Kanisa ni jamii ya waamini wanaomkiri Yesu Kristo kama Bwana na Mwokozi — mwili wa Kristo duniani.
body_en: The church is the community of believers who confess Jesus Christ as Lord and Saviour. In continuity with the people of God in Old Testament times, we are called out from the world; and we join together for worship, for fellowship, for instruction in the Word, for the celebration of the Lord's Supper, for service to humanity, and for the worldwide proclamation of the gospel. The church derives its authority from Christ, who is the incarnate Word revealed in the Scriptures. The church is God's family; adopted by Him as children, its members live on the basis of the new covenant. The church is the body of Christ, a community of faith of which Christ Himself is the Head.
body_sw: Kanisa ni jamii ya waamini wanaomkiri Yesu Kristo kama Bwana na Mwokozi. Tukiendeleza urithi wa watu wa Mungu wa nyakati za Agano la Kale, tunaitwa kutoka ulimwenguni; na tunaungana pamoja kwa ibada, kwa ushirika, kwa mafundisho ya Neno, kwa kuadhimisha Meza ya Bwana, kwa kuwahudumia wanadamu, na kwa kutangaza injili ulimwenguni kote. Kanisa hupata mamlaka yake kutoka kwa Kristo, ambaye ni Neno lililofanyika mwili linalofunuliwa katika Maandiko. Kanisa ni familia ya Mungu; wakiwa wamefanywa watoto wake, washiriki wake huishi kwa msingi wa agano jipya. Kanisa ni mwili wa Kristo, jamii ya imani ambayo Kristo mwenyewe ndiye Kichwa chake.

summary_en: In the last days a remnant keeps the commandments of God and the faith of Jesus, announcing His soon return to all the world.
summary_sw: Katika siku za mwisho masalio hushika amri za Mungu na imani ya Yesu, wakitangaza kuja kwake karibuni kwa ulimwengu wote.
body_en: The universal church is composed of all who truly believe in Christ, but in the last days, a time of widespread apostasy, a remnant has been called out to keep the commandments of God and the faith of Jesus. This remnant announces the arrival of the judgment hour, proclaims salvation through Christ, and heralds the approach of His second advent. This proclamation is symbolized by the three angels of Revelation 14; it coincides with the work of judgment in heaven and results in a work of repentance and reform on earth. Every believer is called to have a personal part in this worldwide witness.
body_sw: Kanisa la ulimwengu wote linaundwa na wote wanaomwamini Kristo kwa kweli, lakini katika siku za mwisho, wakati wa uasi ulioenea, masalio wameitwa kushika amri za Mungu na imani ya Yesu. Masalio haya yanatangaza kufika kwa saa ya hukumu, yanatangaza wokovu kupitia Kristo, na yanatangaza kukaribia kwa ujio wake wa pili. Tangazo hili linawakilishwa na malaika watatu wa Ufunuo 14; linaenda sambamba na kazi ya hukumu mbinguni na kuzaa kazi ya toba na matengenezo duniani. Kila muumini anaitwa kushiriki binafsi katika ushuhuda huu wa ulimwengu wote.

title_en: Unity in the Body of Christ
summary_en: In Christ we are one body, drawn from every nation, kindred, tongue, and people — all equal in Him.
summary_sw: Katika Kristo sisi ni mwili mmoja, kutoka kila taifa, kabila, lugha, na jamaa — wote sawa ndani yake.
body_en: The church is one body with many members, called from every nation, kindred, tongue, and people. In Christ we are a new creation; distinctions of race, culture, learning, and nationality, and differences between high and low, rich and poor, male and female, must not be divisive among us. We are all equal in Christ, who by one Spirit has bonded us into one fellowship with Him and with one another; we are to serve and be served without partiality or reservation. This unity has its source in the oneness of the triune God, who has adopted us as His children.
body_sw: Kanisa ni mwili mmoja wenye viungo vingi, vilivyoitwa kutoka kila taifa, kabila, lugha, na jamaa. Katika Kristo sisi ni kiumbe kipya; tofauti za rangi, utamaduni, elimu, na utaifa, na tofauti kati ya wakubwa na wadogo, matajiri na maskini, wanaume na wanawake, hazipaswi kutugawanya. Sisi sote ni sawa katika Kristo, ambaye kwa Roho mmoja ametuunganisha katika ushirika mmoja naye na sisi kwa sisi; tunapaswa kuhudumu na kuhudumiwa bila upendeleo wala masharti. Umoja huu una chanzo chake katika umoja wa Mungu wa Utatu, aliyetufanya watoto wake.

summary_en: By baptism we confess faith in Christ's death and resurrection — buried with Him in the water and raised to new life.
summary_sw: Kwa ubatizo tunakiri imani katika kifo na ufufuo wa Kristo — tukizikwa pamoja naye ndani ya maji na kufufuliwa kwa maisha mapya.
body_en: By baptism we confess our faith in the death and resurrection of Jesus Christ and testify of our death to sin and of our purpose to walk in newness of life. Thus we acknowledge Christ as Lord and Saviour, become His people, and are received as members by His church. Baptism is a symbol of our union with Christ, the forgiveness of our sins, and our reception of the Holy Spirit. It is by immersion in water and follows instruction in the Holy Scriptures and acceptance of their teachings.
body_sw: Kwa ubatizo tunakiri imani yetu katika kifo na ufufuo wa Yesu Kristo, na tunashuhudia kufa kwetu kwa dhambi na nia yetu ya kutembea katika upya wa uzima. Hivyo tunamkubali Kristo kama Bwana na Mwokozi, tunakuwa watu wake, na tunapokelewa kama washiriki na kanisa lake. Ubatizo ni ishara ya muungano wetu na Kristo, msamaha wa dhambi zetu, na kumpokea kwetu Roho Mtakatifu. Unafanyika kwa kuzamishwa ndani ya maji na hufuata mafundisho ya Maandiko Matakatifu na kukubali mafundisho yake.

summary_en: The Lord's Supper is a participation in the emblems of Christ's body and blood, expressing faith in Him until He comes again.
summary_sw: Meza ya Bwana ni kushiriki katika alama za mwili na damu ya Kristo, tukionyesha imani kwake hata atakapokuja tena.
body_en: The Lord's Supper is a participation in the emblems of the body and blood of Jesus as an expression of faith in Him, our Lord and Saviour. In this experience of communion Christ is present to meet and strengthen His people. As we partake, we joyfully proclaim the Lord's death until He comes again. Preparation for the Supper includes self-examination, repentance, and confession. The Master ordained the service of foot washing to signify renewed cleansing, to express a willingness to serve one another in Christlike humility, and to unite our hearts in love. The communion service is open to all believing Christians.
body_sw: Meza ya Bwana ni kushiriki katika alama za mwili na damu ya Yesu kama ishara ya imani kwake, Bwana na Mwokozi wetu. Katika ushirika huu Kristo yupo ili kukutana na watu wake na kuwatia nguvu. Tunaposhiriki, tunatangaza kwa furaha kifo cha Bwana hata atakapokuja tena. Maandalizi kwa ajili ya Meza yanajumuisha kujichunguza, toba, na kuungama. Bwana aliweka huduma ya kuosha miguu ili kuashiria utakaso mpya, kuonyesha utayari wa kuhudumiana kwa unyenyekevu kama wa Kristo, na kuunganisha mioyo yetu katika upendo. Huduma ya ushirika iko wazi kwa Wakristo wote wanaoamini.

summary_en: God gives all members spiritual gifts for the common good of the church and humanity.
summary_sw: Mungu huwapa washiriki wote karama za kiroho kwa faida ya pamoja ya kanisa na wanadamu.
body_en: God bestows upon all members of His church in every age spiritual gifts that each member is to employ in loving ministry for the common good of the church and of humanity. Given by the Holy Spirit, who apportions to each member as He wills, the gifts provide all abilities and ministries needed by the church to fulfill its divinely ordained functions. These gifts include such ministries as faith, healing, prophecy, proclamation, teaching, administration, reconciliation, compassion, and self-sacrificing service. Some members are called of God and endowed by the Spirit for pastoral, evangelistic, and teaching ministries particularly needed to equip the members for service, to build up the church to spiritual maturity, and to foster unity of the faith and knowledge of God.
body_sw: Mungu huwapa washiriki wote wa kanisa lake katika kila kizazi karama za kiroho ambazo kila mshiriki anapaswa kuzitumia katika huduma ya upendo kwa faida ya pamoja ya kanisa na wanadamu. Zikitolewa na Roho Mtakatifu, ambaye humgawia kila mshiriki kama apendavyo, karama hizi hutoa uwezo wote na huduma zote zinazohitajika na kanisa kutimiza kazi zake alizopewa na Mungu. Karama hizi zinajumuisha huduma kama imani, uponyaji, unabii, kuhubiri, kufundisha, utawala, upatanisho, huruma, na utumishi wa kujitoa. Baadhi ya washiriki wanaitwa na Mungu na kupewa uwezo na Roho kwa huduma za kichungaji, uinjilisti, na ualimu zinazohitajika hasa kuwaandaa washiriki kwa utumishi, kulijenga kanisa hadi ukomavu wa kiroho, na kukuza umoja wa imani na kumjua Mungu.

summary_en: Prophecy is an identifying mark of the remnant church, manifested in the ministry of Ellen G. White, whose writings point to the Bible as the standard.
summary_sw: Unabii ni alama ya kanisa la masalio, uliodhihirika katika huduma ya Ellen G. White, ambaye maandiko yake huelekeza kwenye Biblia kama kipimo.
body_en: The Scriptures testify that one of the gifts of the Holy Spirit is prophecy. This gift is an identifying mark of the remnant church, and we believe it was manifested in the ministry of Ellen G. White. Her writings speak with prophetic authority and provide comfort, guidance, instruction, and correction to the church. They also make clear that the Bible is the standard by which all teaching and experience must be tested.
body_sw: Maandiko yanashuhudia kwamba mojawapo ya karama za Roho Mtakatifu ni unabii. Karama hii ni alama ya utambulisho wa kanisa la masalio, na tunaamini ilidhihirika katika huduma ya Ellen G. White. Maandiko yake yanazungumza kwa mamlaka ya kinabii na hutoa faraja, uongozi, mafundisho, na maonyo kwa kanisa. Pia yanaweka wazi kwamba Biblia ndiyo kipimo ambacho mafundisho yote na uzoefu wote lazima vipimwe kwacho.

summary_en: The Ten Commandments express God's love, will, and purposes; salvation is by grace, and its fruit is obedience.
summary_sw: Amri Kumi zinaonyesha upendo, mapenzi, na makusudi ya Mungu; wokovu ni kwa neema, na tunda lake ni utii.
body_en: The great principles of God's law are embodied in the Ten Commandments and exemplified in the life of Christ. They express God's love, will, and purposes concerning human conduct and relationships, and are binding upon all people in every age. These precepts are the basis of God's covenant with His people and the standard in God's judgment. Through the agency of the Holy Spirit they point out sin and awaken a sense of need for a Saviour. Salvation is all of grace and not of works, and its fruit is obedience to the Commandments. This obedience develops Christian character and results in a sense of well-being.
body_sw: Kanuni kuu za sheria ya Mungu zimewekwa katika Amri Kumi na kuonyeshwa katika maisha ya Kristo. Zinaonyesha upendo, mapenzi, na makusudi ya Mungu kuhusu mwenendo na mahusiano ya wanadamu, na zinawafunga watu wote katika kila kizazi. Kanuni hizi ndizo msingi wa agano la Mungu na watu wake na kipimo katika hukumu ya Mungu. Kupitia kazi ya Roho Mtakatifu zinaonyesha dhambi na kuamsha hisia ya kuhitaji Mwokozi. Wokovu ni wa neema tupu wala si wa matendo, na tunda lake ni utii kwa Amri. Utii huu hukuza tabia ya Kikristo na kuleta hali ya ustawi.

summary_en: The seventh-day Sabbath is God's gift — a day of rest, worship, and delight, a sign of our loyalty and sanctification.
summary_sw: Sabato ya siku ya saba ni zawadi ya Mungu — siku ya pumziko, ibada, na furaha, ishara ya uaminifu wetu na utakaso wetu.
body_en: The gracious Creator, after the six days of Creation, rested on the seventh day and instituted the Sabbath for all people as a memorial of Creation. The fourth commandment of God's unchangeable law requires the observance of this seventh-day Sabbath as the day of rest, worship, and ministry in harmony with the teaching and practice of Jesus, the Lord of the Sabbath. The Sabbath is a day of delightful communion with God and one another. It is a symbol of our redemption in Christ, a sign of our sanctification, a token of our allegiance, and a foretaste of our eternal future in God's kingdom. It is observed from evening to evening, sunset to sunset.
body_sw: Muumba mwenye neema, baada ya siku sita za Uumbaji, alipumzika siku ya saba na kuiweka Sabato kwa watu wote kuwa kumbukumbu ya Uumbaji. Amri ya nne ya sheria isiyobadilika ya Mungu inataka kushika Sabato hii ya siku ya saba kama siku ya pumziko, ibada, na huduma kwa kupatana na mafundisho na mfano wa Yesu, Bwana wa Sabato. Sabato ni siku ya ushirika wa furaha na Mungu na sisi kwa sisi. Ni ishara ya ukombozi wetu katika Kristo, ishara ya utakaso wetu, alama ya utii wetu, na ladha ya awali ya maisha yetu ya milele katika ufalme wa Mungu. Inashikwa kuanzia jioni hadi jioni, machweo hadi machweo.

summary_en: We are God's stewards of time, abilities, possessions, and the earth — returning tithe and giving offerings for the gospel.
summary_sw: Sisi ni mawakili wa Mungu wa muda, vipaji, mali, na dunia — tukirudisha zaka na kutoa sadaka kwa ajili ya injili.
body_en: We are God's stewards, entrusted by Him with time and opportunities, abilities and possessions, and the blessings of the earth and its resources. We are responsible to Him for their proper use. We acknowledge God's ownership by faithful service to Him and our fellow human beings, and by returning tithe and giving offerings for the proclamation of His gospel and the support and growth of His church. Stewardship is a privilege given to us by God for nurture in love and the victory over selfishness and covetousness. Stewards rejoice in the blessings that come to others as a result of their faithfulness.
body_sw: Sisi ni mawakili wa Mungu, tuliokabidhiwa naye muda na fursa, vipaji na mali, na baraka za dunia na rasilimali zake. Tunawajibika kwake kwa matumizi yake sahihi. Tunakubali umiliki wa Mungu kwa utumishi mwaminifu kwake na kwa wanadamu wenzetu, na kwa kurudisha zaka na kutoa sadaka kwa ajili ya kutangaza injili yake na kutegemeza na kukuza kanisa lake. Uwakili ni fursa tuliyopewa na Mungu ili kukua katika upendo na kushinda ubinafsi na tamaa. Mawakili hufurahia baraka zinazowafikia wengine kutokana na uaminifu wao.

summary_en: We are called to think, feel, and act in harmony with biblical principles in every aspect of life — body, mind, and spirit.
summary_sw: Tunaitwa kufikiri, kuhisi, na kutenda kwa kupatana na kanuni za Biblia katika kila sehemu ya maisha — mwili, akili, na roho.
body_en: We are called to be a godly people who think, feel, and act in harmony with biblical principles in all aspects of personal and social life. For the Spirit to recreate in us the character of our Lord we involve ourselves only in those things that will produce Christlike purity, health, and joy in our lives. This means that our amusement and entertainment should meet the highest standards of Christian taste and beauty. It also means that because our bodies are the temples of the Holy Spirit, we are to care for them intelligently — adopting healthful diet, abstaining from unclean foods, alcohol, tobacco, and the irresponsible use of drugs, and engaging in whatever brings our thoughts and bodies into the discipline of Christ.
body_sw: Tunaitwa kuwa watu wa Mungu wanaofikiri, kuhisi, na kutenda kwa kupatana na kanuni za Biblia katika sehemu zote za maisha ya binafsi na ya kijamii. Ili Roho aumbe upya ndani yetu tabia ya Bwana wetu, tunajihusisha tu na mambo yatakayozaa usafi, afya, na furaha kama za Kristo katika maisha yetu. Hii inamaanisha kwamba burudani zetu zinapaswa kufikia viwango vya juu vya ladha na uzuri wa Kikristo. Pia inamaanisha kwamba kwa kuwa miili yetu ni hekalu la Roho Mtakatifu, tunapaswa kuitunza kwa busara — tukila chakula chenye afya, tukijiepusha na vyakula visivyo safi, pombe, tumbaku, na matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya, na kujihusisha na chochote kinacholeta mawazo na miili yetu katika nidhamu ya Kristo.

summary_en: Marriage was divinely established in Eden as a lifelong union; the family reflects God's love and nurtures children in Him.
summary_sw: Ndoa iliwekwa na Mungu Edeni kuwa muungano wa maisha yote; familia huakisi upendo wa Mungu na kuwalea watoto ndani yake.
body_en: Marriage was divinely established in Eden and affirmed by Jesus to be a lifelong union between a man and a woman in loving companionship. For the Christian a marriage commitment is to God as well as to the spouse, and should be entered into only between partners who share a common faith. Mutual love, honor, respect, and responsibility are the fabric of this relationship, which is to reflect the love, sanctity, closeness, and permanence of the relationship between Christ and His church. God blesses the family and intends that its members shall assist each other toward complete maturity. Parents are to bring up their children to love and obey the Lord.
body_sw: Ndoa iliwekwa na Mungu huko Edeni na kuthibitishwa na Yesu kuwa muungano wa maisha yote kati ya mwanamume na mwanamke katika urafiki wa upendo. Kwa Mkristo, ahadi ya ndoa ni kwa Mungu na pia kwa mwenzi, na inapaswa kufungwa tu kati ya wenzi wanaoshiriki imani moja. Upendo, heshima, staha, na uwajibikaji wa pande zote ndio msingi wa uhusiano huu, ambao unapaswa kuakisi upendo, utakatifu, ukaribu, na udumu wa uhusiano kati ya Kristo na kanisa lake. Mungu huibariki familia na anakusudia washiriki wake wasaidiane kufikia ukomavu kamili. Wazazi wanapaswa kuwalea watoto wao wampende na kumtii Bwana.

title_en: Christ's Ministry in the Heavenly Sanctuary
title_sw: Huduma ya Kristo katika Patakatifu pa Mbinguni
summary_en: Christ ministers as our High Priest in the heavenly sanctuary; since 1844 He has carried on the investigative judgment.
summary_sw: Kristo anahudumu kama Kuhani wetu Mkuu katika patakatifu pa mbinguni; tangu 1844 anaendesha hukumu ya upelelezi.
body_en: There is a sanctuary in heaven, the true tabernacle that the Lord set up and not humans. In it Christ ministers on our behalf, making available to believers the benefits of His atoning sacrifice offered once for all on the cross. At His ascension He was inaugurated as our great High Priest. In 1844, at the end of the prophetic period of 2300 days, He entered the second and last phase of His atoning ministry — a work of investigative judgment that reveals who among the dead are asleep in Christ and who among the living are abiding in Him, ready for translation into His eternal kingdom. The completion of this ministry will mark the close of human probation before the Second Advent.
body_sw: Kuna patakatifu mbinguni, hema ya kweli ambayo Bwana aliiweka wala si mwanadamu. Ndani yake Kristo anahudumu kwa niaba yetu, akiwapatia waamini faida za dhabihu yake ya upatanisho iliyotolewa mara moja kwa wote msalabani. Alipopaa alizinduliwa kuwa Kuhani wetu Mkuu. Mwaka 1844, mwishoni mwa kipindi cha unabii cha siku 2300, aliingia awamu ya pili na ya mwisho ya huduma yake ya upatanisho — kazi ya hukumu ya upelelezi inayodhihirisha ni nani kati ya waliokufa wamelala katika Kristo, na ni nani kati ya walio hai wanakaa ndani yake, tayari kuhamishiwa katika ufalme wake wa milele. Kukamilika kwa huduma hii kutaashiria kufungwa kwa muda wa rehema kabla ya Ujio wa Pili.

title_sw: Kuja Mara ya Pili kwa Kristo
summary_en: Christ's return is literal, personal, visible, and worldwide — the blessed hope of the church, and it is near.
summary_sw: Kurudi kwa Kristo ni halisi, binafsi, kunakoonekana, na kwa ulimwengu wote — tumaini lenye baraka la kanisa, nako ni karibu.
body_en: The second coming of Christ is the blessed hope of the church, the grand climax of the gospel. The Saviour's coming will be literal, personal, visible, and worldwide. When He returns, the righteous dead will be resurrected and, together with the righteous living, will be glorified and taken to heaven, but the unrighteous will die. The almost complete fulfillment of most lines of prophecy, together with the present condition of the world, indicates that Christ's coming is near. The time of that event has not been revealed, and we are therefore exhorted to be ready at all times.
body_sw: Kuja mara ya pili kwa Kristo ni tumaini lenye baraka la kanisa, kilele kikuu cha injili. Kuja kwa Mwokozi kutakuwa halisi, binafsi, kunakoonekana, na kwa ulimwengu wote. Atakaporudi, wenye haki waliokufa watafufuliwa na, pamoja na wenye haki walio hai, watatukuzwa na kuchukuliwa mbinguni, lakini wasio haki watakufa. Utimilifu unaokaribia ukamilifu wa mistari mingi ya unabii, pamoja na hali ya sasa ya ulimwengu, unaonyesha kwamba kuja kwa Kristo ni karibu. Wakati wa tukio hilo haujafunuliwa, na kwa hiyo tunahimizwa kuwa tayari wakati wote.

summary_en: Death is an unconscious sleep until the resurrection; Christ, our life, will raise the righteous at His coming.
summary_sw: Mauti ni usingizi usio na fahamu hadi ufufuo; Kristo, uzima wetu, atawafufua wenye haki atakapokuja.
body_en: The wages of sin is death. But God, who alone is immortal, will grant eternal life to His redeemed. Until that day death is an unconscious state for all people. When Christ, who is our life, appears, the resurrected righteous and the living righteous will be glorified and caught up to meet their Lord. The second resurrection, the resurrection of the unrighteous, will take place a thousand years later.
body_sw: Mshahara wa dhambi ni mauti. Lakini Mungu, ambaye peke yake hafi, atawapa uzima wa milele waliokombolewa wake. Hadi siku hiyo, mauti ni hali isiyo na fahamu kwa watu wote. Kristo, aliye uzima wetu, atakapotokea, wenye haki waliofufuliwa na wenye haki walio hai watatukuzwa na kunyakuliwa kumlaki Bwana wao. Ufufuo wa pili, ufufuo wa wasio haki, utafanyika miaka elfu baadaye.

title_en: The Millennium and the End of Sin
summary_en: The saved reign with Christ in heaven for a thousand years; afterward sin and sinners are forever destroyed.
summary_sw: Waliokolewa watatawala pamoja na Kristo mbinguni kwa miaka elfu; baadaye dhambi na wenye dhambi wataangamizwa milele.
body_en: The millennium is the thousand-year reign of Christ with His saints in heaven between the first and second resurrections. During this time the wicked dead will be judged; the earth will be utterly desolate, without living human inhabitants, but occupied by Satan and his angels. At its close Christ with His saints and the Holy City will descend from heaven to earth. The unrighteous dead will then be resurrected, and with Satan and his angels will surround the city; but fire from God will consume them and cleanse the earth. The universe will thus be freed of sin and sinners forever.
body_sw: Milenia ni utawala wa miaka elfu wa Kristo pamoja na watakatifu wake mbinguni kati ya ufufuo wa kwanza na wa pili. Wakati huu wafu waovu watahukumiwa; dunia itakuwa ukiwa kabisa, bila wanadamu walio hai, lakini ikikaliwa na Shetani na malaika zake. Mwishoni mwake Kristo pamoja na watakatifu wake na Mji Mtakatifu watashuka kutoka mbinguni hadi duniani. Wafu wasio haki ndipo watafufuliwa, na pamoja na Shetani na malaika zake watauzunguka mji; lakini moto kutoka kwa Mungu utawateketeza na kuisafisha dunia. Hivyo ulimwengu wote utawekwa huru na dhambi na wenye dhambi milele.

summary_en: God will make all things new — a home for the redeemed where righteousness dwells and suffering is no more.
summary_sw: Mungu atafanya vitu vyote kuwa vipya — makao ya waliokombolewa ambako haki hukaa na mateso hayapo tena.
body_en: On the new earth, in which righteousness dwells, God will provide an eternal home for the redeemed and a perfect environment for everlasting life, love, joy, and learning in His presence. For here God Himself will dwell with His people, and suffering and death will have passed away. The great controversy will be ended, and sin will be no more. All things, animate and inanimate, will declare that God is love; and He shall reign forever.
body_sw: Katika dunia mpya, ambamo haki hukaa, Mungu atawapa waliokombolewa makao ya milele na mazingira makamilifu kwa uzima wa milele, upendo, furaha, na kujifunza mbele zake. Kwa maana hapa Mungu mwenyewe atakaa pamoja na watu wake, na mateso na mauti yatakuwa yamepita. Pambano kuu litakuwa limekwisha, na dhambi haitakuwepo tena. Vitu vyote, vilivyo hai na visivyo hai, vitatangaza kwamba Mungu ni upendo; naye atatawala milele na milele.
